requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品强制能效标签（SANS 941）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品強制能效標籤（SANS 941）

summary.en: South Africa operates a mandatory energy-efficiency labelling scheme for specified electrical appliances, including lighting, under SANS 941 (Energy efficiency of electrical and electronic apparatus) and the supporting Compulsory Specification administered by the NRCS. In-scope products must carry the South African energy-efficiency label showing the energy class on an A-class scale and the relevant performance data. The labelling obligation is enforced through the NRCS and is a pre-market requirement for products covered by the Compulsory Specification for energy efficiency and labelling. Manufacturers/importers must register the product and apply the prescribed label format before sale. Exact product scope and class thresholds are set by the regulation in force — verify the current edition of SANS 941 and the applicable NRCS Compulsory Specification for LED lamps and luminaires.
summary.zh: 南非依据 SANS 941（电气和电子设备能效）及由 NRCS 管理的配套强制性规范，对包括照明在内的指定电气设备实施强制能效标签方案。适用范围内的产品须贴附南非能效标签，以 A 类等级标尺显示能效等级及相关性能数据。该标签义务通过 NRCS 执行，是受能效与标签强制性规范涵盖产品的上市前要求。制造商/进口商须在销售前登记产品并采用规定的标签格式。确切的产品范围和等级阈值由现行法规设定——请核查现行版 SANS 941 及适用于 LED 灯和灯具的现行 NRCS 强制性规范。
summary.zht: 南非依據 SANS 941（電氣和電子設備能效）及由 NRCS 管理的配套強制性規範，對包括照明在內的指定電氣設備實施強制能效標籤方案。適用範圍內的產品須貼附南非能效標籤，以 A 類等級標尺顯示能效等級及相關性能數據。該標籤義務通過 NRCS 執行，是受能效與標籤強制性規範涵蓋產品的上市前要求。製造商/進口商須在銷售前登記產品並採用規定的標籤格式。確切的產品範圍和等級閾值由現行法規設定——請核查現行版 SANS 941 及適用於 LED 燈和燈具的現行 NRCS 強制性規範。

standards_or_laws: SANS 941 — Energy efficiency of electrical and electronic apparatus (South African mandatory energy-efficiency labelling)
NRCS Compulsory Specification for energy efficiency and labelling of electrical apparatus (mandatory energy label)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires / LED lamps), which defines energy-efficiency grades (typically Grade 1 highest down to a minimum grade for market entry) based on luminous efficacy (lm/W). The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP. China uses absolute lm/W grade thresholds and a CEL label format distinct from the South African scheme; there is no mutual recognition between the China Energy Label and the South African SANS 941 label.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品/LED 灯能效要求），依据光效（lm/W）规定能效等级（通常 1 级最高，至市场准入的最低等级）。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，由市场监管总局（SAMR）/CQC/CECP 管理。中国采用绝对 lm/W 等级阈值及不同于南非方案的 CEL 标识格式；中国能效标识与南非 SANS 941 标签之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品/LED 燈能效要求），依據光效（lm/W）規定能效等級（通常 1 級最高，至市場准入的最低等級）。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，由市場監管總局（SAMR）/CQC/CECP 管理。中國採用絕對 lm/W 等級閾值及不同於南非方案的 CEL 標識格式；中國能效標識與南非 SANS 941 標籤之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires / LED lamps (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both China (GB 30255 + CEL) and South Africa (SANS 941) operate mandatory energy-efficiency labelling, but the schemes are not mutually recognised. A Chinese manufacturer must re-test and re-register for the South African label format under SANS 941 and the NRCS Compulsory Specification; a China Energy Label does not substitute for the South African label. The class scales differ (CN absolute lm/W grades vs the SANS 941 class scale), so a product's CN grade does not map directly to a South African class. The South African energy label is applied/enforced through the NRCS and is generally bundled with the broader NRCS LOA process for electrical products — verify current SANS 941 scope and label format for the specific LED product type.
gap.zh: 中国（GB 30255 + CEL）和南非（SANS 941）均实施强制能效标签，但两套方案不存在互认。中国制造商须依据 SANS 941 及 NRCS 强制性规范，针对南非标签格式重新检测并重新注册；中国能效标识不可替代南非标签。等级标尺不同（中国绝对 lm/W 等级 vs SANS 941 等级标尺），因此产品的中国等级不能直接映射为南非等级。南非能效标签通过 NRCS 应用/执行，通常与电气产品更广泛的 NRCS LOA 流程捆绑——请核查具体 LED 产品类型适用的现行 SANS 941 范围及标签格式。
gap.zht: 中國（GB 30255 + CEL）和南非（SANS 941）均實施強制能效標籤，但兩套方案不存在互認。中國製造商須依據 SANS 941 及 NRCS 強制性規範，針對南非標籤格式重新檢測並重新注冊；中國能效標識不可替代南非標籤。等級標尺不同（中國絕對 lm/W 等級 vs SANS 941 等級標尺），因此產品的中國等級不能直接映射為南非等級。南非能效標籤通過 NRCS 應用/執行，通常與電氣產品更廣泛的 NRCS LOA 流程捆綁——請核查具體 LED 產品類型適用的現行 SANS 941 範圍及標籤格式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where in scope) — SANS 941 energy-efficiency labelling required for in-scope lighting/electrical products under the NRCS Compulsory Specification before market placement; verify current scope for LED lamps and luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label registration required under GB 30255 before affixing CEL; minimum grade is the market-entry threshold in China

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Africa requires mandatory energy-efficiency labelling under SANS 941 and the NRCS Compulsory Specification for in-scope lighting and electrical products. A China Energy Label does not satisfy this requirement — the product must be tested and labelled to the South African format and is enforced via the NRCS. Verify the current SANS 941 edition and the precise scope and class thresholds for the specific LED lamp or luminaire before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非依据 SANS 941 及 NRCS 强制性规范，对适用范围内的照明和电气产品实施强制能效标签。中国能效标识不满足此要求——产品须按南非格式检测和贴标，并通过 NRCS 执行。进入市场前，请核查现行 SANS 941 版本及具体 LED 灯或灯具适用的确切范围和等级阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非依據 SANS 941 及 NRCS 強制性規範，對適用範圍內的照明和電氣產品實施強制能效標籤。中國能效標識不滿足此要求——產品須按南非格式檢測和貼標，並通過 NRCS 執行。進入市場前，請核查現行 SANS 941 版本及具體 LED 燈或燈具適用的確切範圍和等級閾值。

requirement_topic.en: NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) under the Lighting Compulsory Specification
requirement_topic.zh: 照明强制性规范下的 NRCS 授权函（LOA）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明強制性規範下的 NRCS 授權函（LOA）

summary.en: Before LED luminaires and lamps can be legally sold or imported into South Africa, an NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) must be obtained under the applicable Compulsory Specification (VC) for lighting/electrical products. The LOA is granted by the National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS) on the basis of test reports demonstrating conformity to the referenced SANS/IEC standards (e.g., SANS IEC 60598, SANS IEC 62560). Key features: (1) the LOA is generally held by a South Africa-based importer/manufacturer (a local legal entity is required); (2) the application requires a compliant test report, often from a SANAS-accredited or NRCS-accepted laboratory; (3) the LOA is product/model specific; (4) products on the market may be subject to NRCS market surveillance and sampling. The LOA is the core market-access gate — it is not a quality mark but a mandatory authorisation.
summary.zh: LED 灯具和灯在南非合法销售或进口前，须依据适用于照明/电气产品的强制性规范（VC）取得 NRCS 授权函（LOA）。LOA 由南非国家强制性规范监管机构（NRCS）根据证明符合所引用 SANS/IEC 标准（如 SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560）的检测报告授予。主要特征：（1）LOA 通常由南非本地进口商/制造商持有（须为本地法人实体）；（2）申请须提供合规检测报告，通常来自 SANAS 认可或 NRCS 接受的实验室；（3）LOA 针对特定产品/型号；（4）市场上的产品可能受 NRCS 市场监督和抽样检查。LOA 是核心市场准入关口——其并非质量标志，而是强制性授权。
summary.zht: LED 燈具和燈在南非合法銷售或進口前，須依據適用於照明/電氣產品的強制性規範（VC）取得 NRCS 授權函（LOA）。LOA 由南非國家強制性規範監管機構（NRCS）根據證明符合所引用 SANS/IEC 標準（如 SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560）的檢測報告授予。主要特徵：（1）LOA 通常由南非本地進口商/製造商持有（須為本地法人實體）；（2）申請須提供合規檢測報告，通常來自 SANAS 認可或 NRCS 接受的實驗室；（3）LOA 針對特定產品/型號；（4）市場上的產品可能受 NRCS 市場監督和抽樣檢查。LOA 是核心市場准入關口——其並非質量標誌，而是強制性授權。

standards_or_laws: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act, 2008 (Act No. 5 of 2008) — NRCS mandate and Letter of Authority (LOA) regime
NRCS Compulsory Specification (VC) for lighting/electrical products — references SANS IEC 60598 / SANS IEC 62560

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory authorisation for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified through CNCA-authorised bodies such as CQC. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification with factory inspection. For products outside mandatory CCC scope, CQC voluntary certification is available. CCC is product/model based and references GB standards. CCC certificates and Chinese GB test reports are not accepted as a substitute for the NRCS LOA, and Chinese certification bodies are not recognised for South African LOA purposes.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制授权为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理并通过 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）认证。CCC 为带工厂检查的强制性第三方认证。对于非强制 CCC 范畴的产品，可申请 CQC 自愿性认证。CCC 基于产品/型号并引用 GB 标准。CCC 证书及中国 GB 检测报告不被接受为 NRCS LOA 的替代，中国认证机构不被南非 LOA 目的所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制授權為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理並通過 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）認證。CCC 為帶工廠檢查的強制性第三方認證。對於非強制 CCC 範疇的產品，可申請 CQC 自願性認證。CCC 基於產品/型號並引用 GB 標準。CCC 證書及中國 GB 檢測報告不被接受為 NRCS LOA 的替代，中國認證機構不被南非 LOA 目的所認可。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by CNCA, certified through CQC; references GB standards for luminaires
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: The NRCS LOA is a South Africa-specific mandatory authorisation with no mutual recognition with CCC. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) the LOA must be held by a South Africa-based importer/legal entity — an overseas manufacturer cannot self-hold it the way it might rely on its own CCC certificate, so a local importer or representative must be engaged; (2) conformity must be demonstrated to SANS/IEC editions in force in South Africa (not GB), typically via a test report acceptable to the NRCS; (3) CCC certificates do not transfer. Practically, the exporter must arrange SANS/IEC testing, supply a compliant report to the South African importer, and the importer applies for and holds the LOA before any product is placed on the market.
gap.zh: NRCS LOA 是南非特有的强制授权，与 CCC 无互认。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）LOA 须由南非本地进口商/法人实体持有——海外制造商不能像依赖自身 CCC 证书那样自行持有，因此须委托本地进口商或代表；（2）须证明符合南非现行的 SANS/IEC 版本（而非 GB），通常通过 NRCS 可接受的检测报告；（3）CCC 证书不可转移。实务上，出口商须安排 SANS/IEC 检测，向南非进口商提供合规报告，由进口商在产品上市前申请并持有 LOA。
gap.zht: NRCS LOA 是南非特有的強制授權，與 CCC 無互認。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）LOA 須由南非本地進口商/法人實體持有——海外製造商不能像依賴自身 CCC 證書那樣自行持有，因此須委託本地進口商或代表；（2）須證明符合南非現行的 SANS/IEC 版本（而非 GB），通常通過 NRCS 可接受的檢測報告；（3）CCC 證書不可轉移。實務上，出口商須安排 SANS/IEC 檢測，向南非進口商提供合規報告，由進口商在產品上市前申請並持有 LOA。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) under the applicable lighting/electrical Compulsory Specification is required before LED luminaires or lamps can be sold or imported into South Africa; typically held by a South Africa-based importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; not recognised for NRCS LOA purposes

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) is the core mandatory market-access gate for LED luminaires and lamps in South Africa. It is product/model specific, generally held by a South Africa-based importer, and granted on the basis of SANS/IEC conformity test reports. A Chinese CCC certificate does not substitute for the LOA. Engage a local importer and arrange SANS/IEC testing before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NRCS 授权函（LOA）是 LED 灯具和灯进入南非的核心强制市场准入关口。其针对特定产品/型号，通常由南非本地进口商持有，并基于 SANS/IEC 符合性检测报告授予。中国 CCC 证书不可替代 LOA。进入市场前，请委托本地进口商并安排 SANS/IEC 检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NRCS 授權函（LOA）是 LED 燈具和燈進入南非的核心強制市場准入關口。其針對特定產品/型號，通常由南非本地進口商持有，並基於 SANS/IEC 符合性檢測報告授予。中國 CCC 證書不可替代 LOA。進入市場前，請委託本地進口商並安排 SANS/IEC 檢測。
